title: Effect of Petition for Certiorari on Execution. A Petition for Certiorari with
content: 12 the Court of Appeals or the Supreme Court shall not stay the execution of the assailed 13 decision of the Secretary, unless a restraining order is issued by said courts. 14 15 16 Clemency 17 18
